mapper.insert: INSERT INTO author_applications (user_id, reason, status, feedback, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{feedback}, #{reviewedBy}, #{reviewedAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, reason, status, feedback, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM author_applications WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id, reason, status, feedback, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM author_applications WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE author_applications SET reason = #{reason}, status = #{status}, feedback = NULL, reviewed_by = NULL, reviewed_at = NULL, created_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE author_applications SET status = #{status}, feedback = #{feedback}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
mapper.sql: a.id, a.user_id, u.username, u.nickname, a.reason, a.status, a.feedback, a.reviewed_by, a.reviewed_at, a.created_at, a.updated_at
